prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科组最低位次约 2943→2633→2501→1778→1650，整体呈持续前移趋势，近 3 年累计前移约 851 名，年均前移约 284 名；2025 年基准位次约 1650 名；该校在黑龙江省理科组招生计划：2021 年 37 人、2022 年 64 人、2023 年 63 人、2024 年 63 人、2025 年 63 人；2026 年计划 61 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招约 3.2%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 21 名，近年排名稳定在 Top20–21 区间；2026 年声誉评价为「明显负面」，主要涉及学术不端与师德师风事件（生科院院长论文造假等），可能对报考热度产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 36（较热），关注度中等；2022 年河南曾出现投档线断档记录；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上共 14 个学科：化学 A+、数学 A+、工商管理 A+、应用经济学 A+、统计学 A、物理学 A、生物学 A、马克思主义理论 A、世界史 A、中国史 A、中国语言文学 A、政治学 A、理论经济学 A、环境科学与工程 A-，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校理科试验班（数学与大数据）、工科试验班（信息科学与技术）等招生专业高度契合；黑龙江省 2026 年普通高考总考生约 167000 人，按近年比例估算物理类约 113894 人，较 2025 年减少约 3%，竞争略有缓解；南开大学位于天津，非本省高校，无本地倾斜；该校在黑龙江省招生占比约 2.2%（2025 年），属外省招生中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强劲趋势、2026 年小幅缩招及物理类考生减少的抵消作用，考虑位次前移趋势力量更强，小幅下调 30 名；预测最低位次约1589名，区间1363–1815名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 2943→2633→2501→1778→1650, showing a continuous forward trend overall. In the past 3 years, it has moved forward by about 851 places, with an average annual forward movement of about 284 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1650. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Heilongjiang Province: 37 in 2021, 64 in 2022, 63 in 2023, 63 in 2024, and 63 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 61, a slight reduction of about 3.2% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with recent rankings stable in the Top20–21 range. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', mainly involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents (such as the paper fraud by the dean of the School of Life Sciences), which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), with moderate attention. In 2022, a cutoff score gap occurred in Henan. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Statistics A, Physics A, Biology A, Marxist Theory A, World History A, Chinese History A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Political Science A, Theoretical Economics A, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, indicating strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's admission majors like Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) and Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology). In 2026, the total number of general college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 113,894 based on recent proportions, a decrease of about 3% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in the province, so there is no local preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Heilongjiang Province is about 2.2% (2025), which is a moderate level for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous forward movement in historical rankings, the slight reduction in enrollment in 2026, and the offsetting effect of the decrease in Physics Category candidates, with the forward trend force being stronger, a slight downward adjustment of 30 places is made. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1589, with a range of 1363–1815.
